# TDD Pipeline State
Ticket:       (set by orchestrator on run)
Description:  (set by orchestrator on run)
Feature type: (set by orchestrator on run)
Stack:        (detected by context-builder)
Branch:       (created by git-setup)
Started:      (set on run)
Last updated: (set on run)

| Stage | Agent             | Status | Notes                        |
|-------|-------------------|--------|------------------------------|
| 1     | Git Setup         | ⏳     |                              |
| 2     | Context Builder   | ⏳     |                              |
| 3     | Test Generator    | ⏳     |                              |
| 4     | Test Executor     | ⏳     |                              |
| 5     | Feature Developer | ⏳     |                              |
| 6     | Code Validator    | ⏳     |                              |
| 7     | Git Committer     | ⏳     |                              |
